Body.Content:
We are announcing the ability to restore accidentally deleted flows in Power Automate. This feature will reach public preview on June 1, 2026.

How does this affect me?
This feature allows flow owners, co-owners, and environment administrators to recover deleted flows quickly and easily within a set timeframe (21 days after deletion), eliminating the need to contact customer support for assistance.

Users can restore flows by:
  • Using the Power Automate Management connector to restore the deleted flows.
  • Using PowerShell to restore the deleted flows.
What action do I need to take?
This message is for awareness, and no action is required.

If you would like more information on this feature, please visit Restore deleted flows.

Title: Power Automate - Restore accidentally deleted flows
